#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
MSG="${1:?}"; LOCATOR="${2:?}"
TENANT=50186224-2255-444a-b321-60a84114115c
APP_ID=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name mskai-agent-app-id --query value -o tsv)
SECRET=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name mskai-agent-client-secret --query value -o tsv)
CATALOG=7bf1ab4b-ff0d-4dc1-8252-e14b60751d4a
# Resolve chat id. Accept 19:* (group/channel), a:* (personal 1:1), or topic name.
if [[ "$LOCATOR" == 19:* || "$LOCATOR" == a:* ]]; then
  CHAT_ID="$LOCATOR"
else
  MSO_TOKEN=$(/home/azureuser/mso-graph-token.sh)
  CHAT_ID=$(LOCATOR="$LOCATOR" MSO_TOKEN="$MSO_TOKEN" python3 -c '
import json, urllib.request, os, sys
url = "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/me/chats?%24top=50&%24select=id,topic"
while url:
  r = json.loads(urllib.request.urlopen(urllib.request.Request(url, headers={"Authorization":"Bearer "+os.environ["MSO_TOKEN"]})).read())
  for c in r.get("value",[]):
    if os.environ["LOCATOR"].lower() in (c.get("topic") or "").lower(): print(c["id"]); sys.exit(0)
  url = r.get("@odata.nextLink","")
sys.exit(1)')
fi
# Blocklist: chats where this bot has been told to stay quiet.
# One chat id per line in /home/azureuser/.mskai-bot/chat-blocklist.
BLOCKLIST=/home/azureuser/.mskai-bot/chat-blocklist
if [ -f "$BLOCKLIST" ] && grep -qxF "$CHAT_ID" "$BLOCKLIST"; then
  echo "BLOCKED: chat $CHAT_ID is on this bot's no-post list. Skipping." >&2
  exit 0
fi

# Personal 1:1 chats (a:*) always have the bot auto-installed when the user DMs it;
# installedApps endpoint returns 404 for them. Skip install logic in that case.
if [[ "$CHAT_ID" != a:* ]]; then
  GRAPH_TOKEN=$(curl -s -X POST "https://login.microsoftonline.com/$TENANT/oauth2/v2.0/token" \
    --data-urlencode "client_id=$APP_ID" --data-urlencode "client_secret=$SECRET" \
    --data-urlencode 'grant_type=client_credentials' --data-urlencode 'scope=https://graph.microsoft.com/.default' \
    | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin)["access_token"])')
  INSTALLED=$(curl -s "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/chats/$CHAT_ID/installedApps?\$expand=teamsApp" \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer $GRAPH_TOKEN" | python3 -c "
import json, sys
for a in json.load(sys.stdin).get('value',[]):
  if (a.get('teamsApp') or {}).get('id')=='$CATALOG': print('yes'); sys.exit(0)
print('no')" 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
  if [ "$INSTALLED" = "no" ]; then
    curl -s -X POST "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/chats/$CHAT_ID/installedApps" \
      -H "Authorization: Bearer $GRAPH_TOKEN" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
      -d "{\"teamsApp@odata.bind\":\"https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps/$CATALOG\"}" >/dev/null
    sleep 3
  fi
fi
BF_TOKEN=$(curl -s -X POST "https://login.microsoftonline.com/$TENANT/oauth2/v2.0/token" \
  --data-urlencode "client_id=$APP_ID" --data-urlencode "client_secret=$SECRET" \
  --data-urlencode 'grant_type=client_credentials' --data-urlencode 'scope=https://api.botframework.com/.default' \
  | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin)["access_token"])')
MSG_JSON=$(python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.dumps(sys.argv[1]))' "$MSG")
RESP=$(curl -sS -w "\n__HTTP_CODE__:%{http_code}" -X POST "https://smba.trafficmanager.net/amer/$TENANT/v3/conversations/$CHAT_ID/activities" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $BF_TOKEN" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d "{\"type\":\"message\",\"from\":{\"id\":\"28:$APP_ID\",\"name\":\"Claude\"},\"conversation\":{\"id\":\"$CHAT_ID\"},\"textFormat\":\"markdown\",\"text\":$MSG_JSON}")
echo "$RESP"
CODE=$(echo "$RESP" | grep -o '__HTTP_CODE__:[0-9]*' | cut -d: -f2)
if [ "$CODE" != "200" ] && [ "$CODE" != "201" ] && [ "$CODE" != "202" ]; then
  echo "SEND FAILED (HTTP $CODE)" >&2
  exit 1
fi
marker-end
